title: DOOH Address
description: Optional postal address details for a DOOH placement location. Use only when the seller can disclose a concrete venue or screen address for planning or verification.

line1.description: Street address or venue address line.

line2.description: Optional secondary address line, such as suite, terminal, concourse, or level.

region.description: Region, state, province, or ISO 3166-2 subdivision code.
